surfaceScope.packageBoundary: Haxe declarations merged into the installed Haxelib classPath; runtime Rust and vendored Reflaxe are governed as package artifacts, not application Haxe APIs.

contracts.qualification: Only module/member behavior admitted by the versioned feature-support inventory; Haxe semantics are the oracle inside that set.
Only the target-side MainLoop and EntryPoint paths documented in the concurrency posture.
Linux full CI plus the specifically documented Windows smoke operations; macOS is local-only evidence.
protectedContract: admitted Sys, filesystem, io, process, direct thread, EventLoop, Deque, and pool operations

contracts.qualification: Documented local-server status, body, error, and callback behavior.
Targeted blocking TCP behavior on documented local-server lanes.
protectedContract: admitted address, host, and TCP socket operations

contracts.qualification: Curated UDP smoke behavior only.
Buildable TLS/SNI path; runtime behavior remains certificate-, network-, and environment-sensitive.
protectedContract: admitted sys.ssl names/signatures and documented build path

contracts.qualification: Shared DB interface/type shapes used by separately qualified drivers.
protectedContract: documented Connection, ResultSet, SqlValue, and ResultRow shapes

contracts.qualification: In-memory SQLite runtime smoke boundary.
protectedContract: documented Sqlite connection/query behavior in the admitted smoke

contracts.qualification: Dependency and generated-code compile contract only.
protectedContract: documented Mysql names/signatures and compile behavior

contracts.qualification: Documented Option, Result, and tool operations only.
Only individually documented operations; gaps in traits, borrowed entries, cloning, strings, OsString, and iteration remain visible.
protectedContract: listed Haxe names/signatures and admitted operations

contracts.qualification: Documented lexical borrow regions, slice/string views, and scoped callbacks.
Opaque shared Haxe-reference handle for APIs that expose rust.HxRef<T>; the representation is not contractual.
protectedContract: null/shared-handle semantics needed by admitted APIs

contracts.qualification: Documented typed handle and scoped-guard subset with hxrt.
Metal plus rust_async plus hxrt; synchronous main boundary.
Documented direct file, owned command/narrow child, and blocking localhost socket operations.
protectedContract: listed facade names/signatures and admitted operations

contracts.qualification: Metal-only import hub; exported alias module path is protected.
exclusions: additional rust.* surfaces not listed by Prelude

contracts.qualification: Public preview/tooling surface excluded from stable-major admission until explicitly promoted.
protectedContract: current documented entry points for migration purposes

contracts.qualification: Controlled raw/stringly Rust authority under strict boundary rules.
Compiler/framework implementation only; application imports are unsupported and must be sealed by the helper-boundary guard.
Profile selection, strict app boundary, native-import policy, and documented fallback/report behavior only.
Only the explicitly listed form and placement grammar.
Only the form and environment named by each metadata entry.
Stringly or advanced metadata excluded from stable admission.
Deprecated compatibility alias for rustMetal.
protectedContract: alias recognition and equivalent profile selection

contracts.qualification: Rejected or compiler-owned metadata.
Documented normal output/build/profile/report and structured Cargo controls.
exclusions: environment/tool behavior outside the declared contract

contracts.qualification: Only the documented profile, runtime, module topology, target, or source-ownership domain.
Escape, raw passthrough, runtime-feature, or preview control.
exclusions: stable raw merge semantics unless separately listed

contracts.qualification: Repository enforcement, debug, deprecated/rejected selector, or compiler bootstrap detail.
Machine-readable JSON only; consumers must ignore unknown fields. Versioned schemas and compatibility baselines protect the admitted shape.
Only identifiers explicitly listed in the diagnostic registry; unlisted compiler diagnostics are not admitted.
Documented default, nested, no-hxrt, custom-Cargo, extra-source, and cargo-execution boundaries.
protectedContract: generated Cargo rust-version under the admitted floor-update policy

contracts.qualification: Published Haxelib-shaped package and installed-package workflow.
protectedContract: ZIP layout and safe deterministic paths

contracts.qualification: Generated helper/wrapper details not admitted as consumer API.
